scope: Exact-artifact Linux x86_64 compatibility smoke under Docker Desktop CPU emulation.

environment.virtualization: Docker Desktop Linux VM with --platform linux/amd64

exactNpmRuntime.note: The handoff tarball hash remains in the external artifact audit to avoid a self-mutating packaged hash.

limitations: CPU and userspace execution were emulated on an Apple Silicon host, so this does not replace native Linux x86_64 CI.
Portable vision and Chromium source suites were not repeated in the emulated pass; they passed on Linux ARM64 and remain declared in native x86_64 CI.
